S.FORM: Frank Brickowski sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 8, Frank Brickowski, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *rank ő≤ri ¶~ ®kows~…ēki s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *rank ő≤ri ¶~ ®kows~…ēki, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
